summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact shows this shard is not a dedupe cluster and has no shared canonical; no GitHub mutations, merge, or fix PR actions are allowed. Open hydrated PRs are kept independent for maintainer/backlog review except where a specific blocker requires human attention; security-boundary PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are skipped as keep_closed; five listed PRs were not present in the hydrated preflight artifact and need live hydration before classification.
